title: Retire the reserved invariant name and route registry selection through the source descriptor
description:
With a generic toml-source descriptor available, the `invariant`-name special cases become dead. Remove them so the item-kind engine hardcodes no domain concept.

Scope: delete the `name==INVARIANT_KIND_NAME` rejection in `from_config` (item.rs:496-500) and the `InvariantMustBeProjectRegistryFirst` variant (item.rs:382-388); remove the `name()==INVARIANT_KIND_NAME` routing guard and `UnknownRegistrySource` path (commands/item.rs:202,205-212). `invariant` resolves as ordinary config over its `.toml` source via the configured toml source descriptor. No `"invariant"` literal is relocated into pure/engine code. Update all reserved-name tests (item.rs:1554-1659,1533-1543; commands/item.rs:804-890; tests/item_cli_tests.rs:497-564,308). Keep item.rs:1661-1675 (MissingProjectSource).

## Success Criteria
- [hard] REQ-03: The reserved-name branch and the InvariantMustBeProjectRegistryFirst / UnknownRegistrySource routing are removed (a tree-wide grep including tests, fixtures, and docs finds no surviving reserved-name branch in the engine path), no `"invariant"` literal lives in pure or engine code, and existing invariant indexing still works through the descriptor.
